inputs.label: Annualized Volatility Asset 1 (%)
inputs.businessContext: The annualized volatility (standard deviation of returns) of Asset 1, expressed as a percentage. Used to determine its risk contribution.

inputs.label: Annualized Volatility Asset 2 (%)
inputs.businessContext: The annualized volatility of Asset 2, as a percentage. Inputting a high value will reduce its weight.

inputs.label: Annualized Volatility Asset 3 (%)
inputs.businessContext: The annualized volatility of Asset 3. Use a very large number (e.g., 1e9) if this asset is not in the portfolio to effectively exclude it.

inputs.label: Annualized Volatility Asset 4 (%)
inputs.businessContext: The annualized volatility of Asset 4. Set to a very large number if unused.
